title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock III
hints: Consider splitting the timeline into two parts. What is the best profit if you finish your first transaction exactly at a specific day?
Precompute the maximum profit achievable for one transaction in the prefix ending at each day, and another array for the suffix starting at each day.
Combine these two arrays. The answer is the maximum sum of a left-prefix profit and a right-suffix profit across all possible split points.
